tools.name: list_files
tools.description: List files and folders in Google Drive. Returns file IDs, names, and metadata.

parameters.name: folder_id
parameters.description: Folder ID to list (root if not specified)

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results per page (default: 10, max: 100)

tools.name: get_file
tools.description: Get file metadata and download URL for a file in Google Drive.

parameters.name: file_id
parameters.description: ID of the file to retrieve

parameters.name: export_format
parameters.description: Format to export (pdf, docx, xlsx, etc)

tools.name: create_file
tools.description: Create a new file or folder in Google Drive.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of the file or folder

tools.name: share_file
tools.description: Share a file with specified users or make it public.

parameters.name: file_id
parameters.description: ID of the file to share

tools.name: delete_file
tools.description: Delete a file or folder from Google Drive.

parameters.name: file_id
parameters.description: ID of the file to delete
